caption: Two men are seated in a room, reacting to content displayed on a television screen. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, and the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, holding his hand to his mouth. Behind them, a shelf holds a collection of DVDs and CDs. Above the screen, bright yellow neon text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The television displays a cinematic video; in the first two frames, it shows a structure with a blue dome under a hazy sky with the text "is beyond the thoughts and capacity of his enemy." In the subsequent frames, the scene shifts to an interior shot of three figures in dark attire standing before a large, bright arched doorway. The men's expressions and positions remain relatively static throughout the sequence as the visual content on the screen changes.
